title: Baryonyx catching Fish Coloring Page
seoTitle: Baryonyx catching Fish Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Detailed Baryonyx using its large claws to catch fish in a shallow lake. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Baryonyx catching Fish had a long, crocodile-like snout and a massive 12-inch (31 cm) curved claw on its first finger, perfect for catching fish.
The name of Baryonyx catching Fish means 'heavy claw', referencing the massive thumb spikes it used to spear prey in swampy waters.
